messages.content: Childhood sweethearts, often simply referred to as "old friends from childhood", refers to two individuals that have known each other since childhood and have maintained a close relationship as they grow up together.
回复这段话：Hello, yes I’m currently working on some more chapters
Great to hear that you're working on more chapters! Can't wait to see what you come up with. Keep up the good work!
帮我想一个委婉的催稿话术

以下是一个可能的委婉催稿话术：

尊敬的XX先生/女士，

我希望这封邮件能够找到您好。我们之前有谈到过关于XXX的事项，我想确认一下目前进展情况如何。

作为我们合作的重要伙伴，我们非常珍视您的意见和贡献。我们也知道在创作过程中有时工作量会比较困难。但考虑到我们的时间安排和工作计划，我想尽快了解到您的近期进展情况，以便我们共同协调下一步计划。

如果您需要任何帮助或对某些事情有疑问，请务必告知我们，我们会尽力提供支持和协助您完成任务。

非常感谢您的耐心和合作。期待尽快收到您的回复。

祝一切顺利！

此致，

敬礼

【你的姓名】

翻译为英文：我想知道目前写作的进展如何，作为我们合作的重要伙伴，我们非常珍视您的意见和贡献。我们也知道在创作过程中有时工作量会比较困难。
如果您需要任何帮助或对某些事情有疑问，请务必告知我们，我们会尽力提供支持和协助您完成任务。

非常感谢您的耐心和合作。期待尽快收到您的回复。

I would like to know how the writing progress is going currently. As an important partner in our collaboration, we highly value your opinions and contributions. We also understand that the workload can sometimes be challenging during the creative process.

If you need any assistance or have any questions about anything, please do not hesitate to let us know, and we will do our best to provide support and help you complete the task.

Thank you very much for your patience and cooperation. We look forward to hearing from you soon.

回复以下消息：Hey Shawn, the writing process is going good. Although I had just recovered from jaundice last month. And so I have been making some trips to the hospital making it difficult to keep track... But it was my last day yesterday and now I have started working on the book full time and getting back on track. 
I am trying sorry for wasting time but it was not at all intentionally done.I will be sending in two chapters each day to gets book the books started of faster.

Hey there,

No need to apologize for the time taken as I hope you're feeling better now after your health issues. I appreciate you giving me an update on your progress and I'm glad to hear you're back on track with the book. 

Sending in two chapters each day sounds like a good plan to get things started faster. Please don't hesitate to reach out if you need any assistance or have any further updates.

Best,
[Your Name]
回复以下消息：Well. Since I am just recovering, I can update for the remaining month but I don’t think I will be able to update for next month at kk. I am having practical Exams and Theory.

Hey there,

Thanks for the update. I hope your recovery is going well and that you're feeling better soon. I completely understand that you may not be able to update for next month due to practical exams and theory. Please don't worry about it as your health and education should always come first.

Please let me know if there's anything I can do to support you during this time. Wishing you all the best for your exams.

Take care,
[Your Name]
回复以下消息：Alright. I will make sure to reach 50k or more if possible. Thank you very much for understanding

Great to hear that you're committed to reaching 50k or more! Take your time and focus on producing quality work, and we will be happy to support you throughout the process. 

Wishing you all the best on this journey, and please don't hesitate to reach out if you need any help or support.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
回复这段话：Hi Shawn, I am working on the next chapters, two of them are already nearly done. I'll upload them today after a final edit

That's great to hear, Shawn! I'm looking forward to reading the latest chapters, and I appreciate all of your hard work on this project. Take your time with the final edit to ensure that the quality of the work is at its best. Please let me know if you need any support or assistance along the way.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

回复这段话：Hi Shawn! 😊 Sorry, I've been having some personal issues with my other job which has been stealing my attention. Sorry for the delay.
I aim to get the next chapter to you today and will improve my updating.

Hi Shawn,

No need to apologize, I understand that things come up in life that can take priority. I'm sorry to hear that you've been having personal issues with your other job, and I hope everything works out. I appreciate you letting me know about the delay and your commitment to improving your updating.

Take your time with the next chapter, and please don't hesitate to reach out if you need any support or assistance.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
